creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 253869
make recent ports-mgmt/portmaster happy

Recent ports-mgmt/portmaster seems to have trouble with several ports failing with gmake and spuky environment clashes. The problem can be mitigated by setting ${SETNEVI} ${WRK_ENV} according to

/usr/ports/CHANGES
20240229:
AUTHOR: tijl@FreeBSD.org

PR refering this issue with ports-mgmt/portmaster has been filed.
